## PositionModel type

Position component model

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type PositionModel<T = unknown> = ComponentModel & ValueSource<T, PositionValue> & {
    type: 'position';
    keys?: string[];
    min?: number;
    max?: number;
    step?: number;
    onInput?: (model: PositionModel<T>, value: unknown, key?: string | number) => void;
    onChange?: (model: PositionModel<T>, value: unknown, key?: string | number) => void;
    disabled?: boolean;
};
```
